steps.title: Find the sample proportion
steps.content:
In the sample, $20$ out of $25$ employees are enrolled in exactly three courses:
$$
\frac{20}{25}=0.8
$$

steps.title: Scale to all employees
steps.content:
Use the same proportion for the full company of $500$ employees:
$$
0.8\cdot 500=400
$$

steps.title: Match the estimate
steps.content: The best estimate is $400$ employees. The answer is B.
